description.name: Alfama Heritage House
description.headline: Restored townhouse in the historic Alfama district of Lisbon
description.description:
A beautifully restored 19th-century townhouse in the heart of Lisbon's oldest neighbourhood, Alfama.

The property spans three floors and features original azulejo tile work, high ceilings, and a private rooftop terrace with sweeping views over the Tagus river.

Just steps from the famous Miradouro de Santa Luzia viewpoint and within walking distance of the Se Cathedral and tram line 28.

reviews: The rooftop view over the Tagus is worth it alone. Beautifully decorated with so much character.
Staying in Alfama is the real Lisbon experience. The house itself is stunning — tiles, high ceilings, the lot.
Perfect location for exploring the city on foot. The house has a wonderful sense of history.
The tram stops right nearby and the neighbourhood is full of life. Would absolutely stay again.
Gorgeous property, very well equipped. The rooftop terrace sealed the deal for us.

policies.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 14 days before check-in
